name: io.github.riv-lc/areacode-mcp
title: AreaCode.fyi MCP Server
description: North American NANP area-code and phone-number intelligence for AI agents: area-code lookup, NANP phone-number validation, local time, city/state/province coverage, overlays, scam/spoofing context, and block-allocation carrier metadata backed by areacode.fyi.
